2605.23270.title: ChainFlow-VLA: Causal Flow Planning with Vision-Language Models
2605.23270.paper_summary: Current end-to-end autonomous driving systems are fundamentally limited by a mismatch between temporal causal reasoning and global trajectory consistency. Autoregressive (AR) models capture interaction-aware temporal dependencies via causal factorization, but their step-wise decoding leads to error accumulation and suboptimal global structure. In contrast, diffusion models optimize trajectories globally but lack explicit causal constraints, making them unreliable in interactive and safety-critical scenarios. This dichotomy reveals a deeper issue: existing methods treat causal modeling and global optimization as separate paradigms, without a principled way to unify them within a single trajectory distribution. To address this, we propose ChainFlow-VLA, which unifies causal generation and global refinement within a unified probabilistic framework. We formulate planning as a mixture over AR-induced modes and learn Vision-Language Model (VLM)-conditioned residual distributions over these modes. An autoregressive generator (Chain) produces a discrete set of causal trajectory modes, followed by a diffusion-based refiner (Flow) that leverages VLM hidden states as semantic priors to perform mode-conditioned correction in residual space while preserving causal structure. This straightforward conditioning seamlessly injects high-level scene understanding into fine-grained trajectory adjustments. Experiments demonstrate that ChainFlow-VLA achieves robust planning in ambiguous and long-tail scenarios, achieving a state-of-the-art score of 94.85 on the NAVSIM v1 leaderboard, matching human-level performance (94.8). Code will be available at https://github.com/AFARI-Research/ChainFlow-VLA.
2605.23270.paper_summary_zh: 目前的端到端自動駕駛系統在時間因果推理和全球軌跡一致性之間存在根本性的限制。自回歸（AR）模型通過因果因子分解捕捉互動感知的時間依賴性，但其逐步解碼導致錯誤累積和次優的全球結構。相比之下，擴散模型在全球範圍內優化軌跡，但缺乏明確的因果約束，使其在互動和安全關鍵場景中不可靠。這種二元性揭示了一個更深層次的問題：現有方法將因果建模和全球優化視為獨立的範式，沒有一種原則性的方式將它們統一在單一的軌跡分佈中。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了ChainFlow-VLA，它在統一的概率框架內統一了因果生成和全球精煉。我們將規劃公式化為自回歸引起的模式的混合，並在這些模式上學習以視覺-語言模型（VLM）為條件的殘差分佈。一個自回歸生成器（Chain）產生一組離散的因果軌跡模式，然後由一個基於擴散的精煉器（Flow）利用VLM隱藏狀態作為語義先驗，在殘差空間中進行模式條件修正，同時保持因果結構。這種簡單的條件化無縫地將高層次的場景理解注入到細緻的軌跡調整中。實驗表明，ChainFlow-VLA在模糊和長尾場景中實現了穩健的規劃，在NAVSIM v1排行榜上達到了94.85的最先進分數，與人類水平的表現（94.8）相匹配。代碼將在 https://github.com/AFARI-Research/ChainFlow-VLA 上提供。
2605.23270.author: Xiyang Wang et.al.
2605.23270.authors: Xiyang Wang, Xinlin Wang, Tingguang Zhou, Gong Chen, Xingtai Gui, Zhi Xu, Xiaolei Wu, Feiyang Tan, Hangning Zhou, Mu Yang
